fix_summary: Added ManualObjectsClassService for per-dataset class-name files.
Opening a Manual_Objects root now auto-creates Manual_Objects/ID_Classes/<dataset_id>/ for every dataset ID found in the global index.
Class files may use any non-empty .txt filename; classes.txt is not required.
Added a Chinese class-file status dialog with ID, status, class count, selected file, target folder, message, open-folder, and refresh actions.
YOLO bbox overlay labels now use the current item's dataset_id-specific class map when available.
Thumbnail cache keys include the class-map signature so refreshed class files update bbox label text.

class_file_protocol.accepted_filename_rule: Any non-empty .txt file that does not start with an underscore.
class_file_protocol.selection_rule: If multiple valid .txt files exist, use the first by casefold filename order and show MULTIPLE warning.
class_file_protocol.missing_behaviour: BBox drawing remains enabled but falls back to class numbers such as class 0.

safety.new_support_write_scope: Manual_Objects/ID_Classes/<dataset_id>/ directories and user-supplied class txt files only.
